message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate 9 more stub modules to ZigBuilder (batch 3)

Migrated simple stub modules using ZigValue types:
- cmd_mod.zig - Cmd interpreter struct
- runpy_mod.zig - Dynamic execution stubs
- tomllib_mod.zig - TOML parser stubs
- zipapp_mod.zig - Zip archive utilities
- _bz2_mod.zig - BZ2 compression stubs
- _dbm_mod.zig - DBM database stubs
- _gdbm_mod.zig - GNU DBM stubs
- _markupbase_mod.zig - Markup parser base
- _md5_mod.zig - MD5 hash stubs

Progress: 28/308 modules migrated (9%)
